tutorial.start: Place one star in each row, column, and region with no stars touching. Tap a cell to start.
tutorial.keepGoing: Keep going. Place one star in each row, column, and outlined region.
tutorial.convertMark: That's a mark. Tap the cell again to make it a star.
tutorial.adjacency: Stars cannot touch. Not even diagonally.
tutorial.row: Each row needs exactly one star.
tutorial.column: Each column needs exactly one star.
tutorial.region: Each outlined region needs exactly one star.
tutorial.skipBody: This one-time walkthrough cannot be replayed.
tutorial.hintsDisabled: Hints are not available during the tutorial.

puzzle.hintsLoadFailed: Could not load hints. Please check your connection and try again.
puzzle.clearBody: This removes every star and mark from the board.

streaks.title: Streaks
streaks.premiumBody: Upgrade to Premium to access past challenges.

account.signUpIntro: Create an account to keep your progress, streaks, and purchases across devices.
account.signInIntro: Access your progress, streaks, and purchases across devices.
account.switchToSignIn: Already have an account? Sign in
account.resetHelper: We will email you a code to reset your password.
account.resetOtpInstructions: Enter the code we sent to {{email}}, then choose a new password.
account.confirmInboxBody: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Open it to finish creating your account.
account.errOtp: Enter the 6-digit code from your email.
account.errPasswordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
account.deleteBody: This permanently deletes your account and all game data including progress, streaks, and entitlements. Purchase receipts stay in your Apple purchase history. This can't be undone.
account.restoredFound: Your Premium access has been restored.
account.restoredNone: No previous purchases found on this account.

paywall.lockedBody: Complete the previous puzzle to unlock this one.
paywall.createAccountToBuy: Create an account to purchase this pack for {{price}}.
paywall.createAccountToBuyNoPrice: Create an account to purchase this pack.
paywall.unavailableBody: This pack isn't available right now. Check back later.

errors.confirmEmail: Confirm your email address before signing in.
errors.accountExists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.passwordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.signupUnavailable: Sign-up is currently unavailable. Try again later.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.offline: You're offline. Check your connection and try again.
errors.syncFailed: Progress sync failed. Check your connection and try again.
errors.syncTimeout: Progress sync timed out. Check your connection and try again.
errors.deleteFailed: Account deletion failed. Try again or contact support.
errors.purchaseLag: Purchase recorded, but access isn't active yet. Tap Restore Purchases.
errors.productUnavailable: This item isn't available right now. Try again later.
errors.packUnavailable: This pack isn't available right now. Try again later.
errors.storageUnavailable: Storage unavailable. Restart the app or reinstall.
